description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical candle with a slightly irregular, organic shape and a subtly curved profile. The exterior surface is predominantly a soft, translucent white, with a hand-painted floral motif featuring delicate yellow blossoms and brown branches on one side. The rim is uneven and naturalistic, mimicking the look of a hand-poured or artisan-crafted candle. The surface has a matte, waxy appearance, and the interior is hollow, suggesting it is made primarily of wax. There are no visible holders or bases, and the bottom appears flat for stable placement. The candle exudes a decorative, artisanal quality suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban settings.
description: A tall, curved, hand-painted white candle with yellow floral designs and a natural, uneven rim. Its matte, waxy surface and hollow interior give it an artisanal, decorative look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the yellow floral motif and branches painted on the candle's surface, with the uneven rim clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view reveals a mostly plain, white wax surface with only a hint of the floral design at the base.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displays a smooth, unadorned white wax surface with subtle textural variations and no visible decoration.
description_view_3: Rear angled view shows the candle's gentle curvature and the transition from decorated to plain wax, with the rim's irregularity visible.
